ddls:
CREATE TABLE "films" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the film */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the film's plot */,
  "release_year" INTEGER /* Year the film was released */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the language of the film */,
  "rental_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the film rental in days */,
  "rental_rate" REAL /* Rental price for the film */,
  "length" INTEGER /* Length of the film in minutes */,
  "replacement_cost" REAL /* Replacement cost for the film if lost */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Rating of the film (e.g., PG, R) */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the film record */,
  "special_features" TEXT /* Special features included with the film */,
  "fulltext" TEXT /* Full-text search keywords for the film */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the film */,
  "director" TEXT /* Director of the film */,
  "cast" TEXT /* Cast of the film */,
  "certificate" TEXT /* Certificate of the film */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the film (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language */,
  "language_code" TEXT /* Code for the language (e.g., en, es, fr) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_cast" (
  "cast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cast member */,
  "cast_name" TEXT /* Name of the cast member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_certificates" (
  "certificate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certificate */,
  "certificate_name" TEXT /* Name of the certificate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certificate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rentals" (
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental transaction */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film being rented */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer renting the film */,
  "rental_date" TEXT /* Date the film was rented */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the film was returned */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member processing the rental */,
  "rental_status" TEXT /* Status of the rental (e.g., pending, rented, returned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rental_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the staff member */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role of the staff member within the organization */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the staff member works */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the store */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the store */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the store */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film in inventory */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the film is located */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Number of copies available for rental */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id", "store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_rental_history" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film rented */,
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rental transaction */,
  "rental_date" TEXT /* Date the film was rented */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the film was returned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id", "rental_id")
)
